component.name: SkillFishOS Hub
component.summary: A software centre for APT, Flatpak and Snap
Un centro software per APT, Flatpak e Snap

description.p: A Discover-style software centre: browse software by category, search, and read app pages with screenshots, ratings and reviews. Install, remove and update across APT (including the SkillFishOS repository), Flatpak and Snap, switch each backend on or off, and manage software sources.
One place to keep the whole system up to date, with sort and filter controls and a one-click "update all" across every backend.

Un centro software in stile Discover: sfoglia per categoria, cerca e leggi le pagine app con screenshot, valutazioni e recensioni. Installa, rimuovi e aggiorna su APT (incluso il repository SkillFishOS), Flatpak e Snap, attiva o disattiva ogni backend e gestisci le sorgenti software.
Un solo posto per tenere tutto il sistema aggiornato, con filtri e ordinamento e un "aggiorna tutto" su ogni backend con un clic.
24-hour on-disk cache for ODRS star ratings: faster launches and ratings keep working offline.
Flatpak app pages now list the sockets permission; code-quality cleanups.
Discover-style app pages with a screenshot carousel; sidebar sub-categories; stability fixes for search and updates.
